parameters.query:
SELECT COUNT(*)::INT AS duplicate_count
FROM invoice_log
WHERE zalo_user_id = '{{$("Validate Inputs").item.json.zalo_user_id}}'
  AND zalo_msg_id = '{{$("Validate Inputs").item.json.zalo_msg_id}}'
  AND status <> 'failed';

INSERT INTO invoice_log (zalo_user_id,zalo_msg_id,channel,sender_id,msg_id,supplier_code,source_type,source_url,parsed_data,status,llm_confidence,processing_time_ms,created_at) VALUES ('{{$json.zalo_user_id}}','{{$json.zalo_msg_id}}','{{$json.channel || 'zalo'}}','{{$json.zalo_user_id}}','{{$json.zalo_msg_id}}','{{$json.supplier_code_sql}}','{{$json.source_type || 'xml'}}','{{$json.source_url.replace(/'/g, "''")}}','{{$json.parsed_data_sql}}'::jsonb,'processing',100,{{$json.processing_time_ms}},NOW()) ON CONFLICT (zalo_user_id, zalo_msg_id) WHERE zalo_msg_id IS NOT NULL DO UPDATE SET supplier_code=EXCLUDED.supplier_code,source_type=EXCLUDED.source_type,source_url=EXCLUDED.source_url,parsed_data=EXCLUDED.parsed_data,status=EXCLUDED.status,llm_confidence=EXCLUDED.llm_confidence,processing_time_ms=EXCLUDED.processing_time_ms,channel=EXCLUDED.channel,sender_id=EXCLUDED.sender_id,msg_id=EXCLUDED.msg_id;
